examples: I've ever had time to sculpt a bust of my father and to burnish it.
Violent stellar winds and powerful radiation from massive stars sculpt the surrounding nebula.
Of equal importance, however, was using lighting to sculpt the car physically: its shaping, line, color, and size.
This allows electronics to replace operator skill in raising and lowering the blade to sculpt terrain.
This led to a trip to Canada to sculpt its prime minister, Mackenzie King.
